description: Style NoteDesigned for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this pair of leather slippers from ganuchi is a great addition to your wardrobe. Product DetailsWide leather straps in thong style with a woven-pattern work on the upper, has a toe separator and a padded fabric inner lining to hold the foot in place in comfortErgonomically curved leather footbed for style and all-day comfortTPR outsole with textured leaf-styled lugs on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and traction on various surfacesMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditionerDo store in direct sunlight
